subject: fix(icons): scale up graph to fill 80% safe zone
body:
Expand graph from 25% to ~70% of canvas. Nodes now span 240-700
(460px of 1024) instead of 384-640 (256px). Node radii increased
proportionally (52→72, 44→60, 60→84). Line width 14→18.

The icon is now legible at 48px favicon size — nodes are distinct
and the graph structure is recognizable.

Tags: icons, design, safe-zone
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch
